Title: Add RRD2 timing and load observability
Description:
Epic: EPIC-RRD2-STABILITY
Type: Feature
Summary: Add per-candidate runtime observability for RRD2 decisions.
Scope: Log rrd_eval_ms, source, phase, candidate key, gate result, reasons, degradation list, queue depth snapshot.
Implementation Tasks: Extend topology warp log payload with eval duration and queue indicators; Add aggregation endpoint for p50/p95 eval timing; Add Ops panel summary for recent RRD2 performance.
Acceptance Criteria: Every new row in identity_topology_warp_log has timing metadata; API returns p50/p95 over selectable windows.
Test Plan: Unit test for timing field presence/type; Integration test validates endpoint aggregate output.
Dependencies: None

Title: Add negative resonance burst damping
Description:
Epic: EPIC-RRD2-STABILITY
Type: Feature
Summary: Reduce resonance false positives during bursty self-mod cycles.
Scope: Rolling window plus refractory logic for high-impact key evaluations.
Implementation Tasks: Compute rolling mean/max for resonance values; Add configurable refractory seconds per key; Persist damping reason when activated.
Acceptance Criteria: Burst evaluations show lower oscillation in negative_resonance; No increase in missed true threshold breaches.
Test Plan: Unit tests for window math and refractory edge cases; Replay test with synthetic burst input.
Dependencies: RRD-101

Title: Auto-route shadow-blocked high-impact writes
Description:
Epic: EPIC-RRD2-STABILITY
Type: Feature
Summary: Remove manual intervention for expected shadow-block events.
Scope: Route blocked high-impact candidates to reflection_residue with reason rrd2_gate and schedule reflection.
Implementation Tasks: Add routing helper for high-impact shadow-block outcomes; Attach gate context to residue metadata; Trigger non-blocking reflection pass.
Acceptance Criteria: All would_block high-impact candidates are persisted as residue with gate evidence; No synchronous consolidation errors.
Test Plan: Integration test from consolidation candidate to residue row.
Dependencies: RRD-102

Title: Escalation policy for persistent blocked keys
Description:
Epic: EPIC-RRD2-STABILITY
Type: Feature
Summary: Require operator intervention only after repeated unresolved blocks.
Scope: Escalate after N consecutive would_block events per key.
Implementation Tasks: Add rolling counter by key and window; Create escalation artifact in Ops panel; Reset counter on key pass.
Acceptance Criteria: Escalation appears only after threshold; Counter resets on pass.
Test Plan: Unit tests for increment/reset semantics.
Dependencies: RRD-103

Title: RRD2 burst performance harness
Description:
Epic: EPIC-RRD2-STABILITY
Type: Test
Summary: Validate behavior under heavy candidate bursts.
Scope: Simulate 500+ candidates including high-impact keys.
Implementation Tasks: Build synthetic burst feeder script; Capture throughput/latency; Produce markdown report artifact.
Acceptance Criteria: No API failures or event-loop starvation; p95 eval time within budget.
Test Plan: Run harness in containerized environment and archive report snapshot.
Dependencies: RRD-101

Acceptance Criteria: Classifier output persisted and queryable per request.
Test Plan: Unit tests over labeled prompt set.
Dependencies: None

Acceptance Criteria: Planner can run and recover from one-step failure.
Test Plan: Integration tests for at least three multi-step workflows.
